destination.ex: Rome is a popular tourist destination.

destiny.ex: He felt that it was his destiny to succeed.

destroy.ex: The earthquake destroyed the entire city.

detail.ex: Please give me all the details.

detailed.ex: He gave a detailed account of the events.

detect.ex: The machine can detect small amounts of radiation.

detective.ex: The detective is investigating the case.

detergent.ex: Use a mild detergent to wash the organic silk.

determination.ex: She was full of determination to succeed.

determine.ex: We need to determine the cause of the fire.

determined.ex: I'm determined to win the competition.

develop.def: 發展、開發、沖洗（照片）、患（病）

development.ex: Exercise is important for the development of muscles.

device.ex: A thermometer is a device for measuring temperature.

devil.col: speak of the devil, a poor devil

devise.ex: She devised a new method for teaching math.

devote.ex: He devoted his life to music.

devotion.ex: His devotion to his family is admirable.

dew.def: 露水、露水般潔淨的東西、形成露水、打濕
dew.ex: The grass was wet with dew.

diagram.ex: Look at the diagram on page 20.

dial.ex: Please dial 9 for an outside line.

dialog(ue).ex: The play has some witty dialogue.

diamond.ex: She is wearing a diamond necklace.

diary.ex: I write in my diary every night.

dictate.def: 口述、命令、支配、底稿、指令
dictate.ex: She dictated the letter to her secretary.

dictation.ex: The teacher gave the class a dictation.

dictator.ex: The country is ruled by a dictator.

dictionary.col: pocket dictionary, look up in a dictionary
dictionary.ex: I need to check the word in the dictionary.

die.col: die of, die for, never say die

diet.col: balanced diet, go on a diet
diet.ex: A healthy diet is important for good health.

differ.ex: The two brothers differ in their opinions.

difference.col: tell the difference, make a difference
difference.ex: What's the difference between the two?

different.col: different from, in many different ways
different.ex: He is different from his brother.

difficult.col: difficult task, find it difficult to
difficult.ex: It's difficult to learn a new language.

difficulty.ex: She did it without any difficulty.

dig.ex: They are digging a hole in the ground.

digest.ex: It takes time to digest heavy food.

digital.def: 數位化的、數字的、數位鐘錶
digital.ex: I bought a new digital watch.

dignity.ex: She maintained her dignity in spite of the insults.

diligence.ex: His success was due to his hard work and diligence.

diligent.ex: She is a very diligent worker.

dim.def: 暗淡的、模糊的、使變暗、變模糊
dim.col: dim light, take a dim view of

dime.ex: He doesn't have a dime to his name.

dine.ex: We dined at a small Italian restaurant.

dinosaur.ex: Dinosaurs lived millions of years ago.

dip.ex: She dipped her toe into the water.

diploma.def: 文憑、畢業證書、發給文憑
diploma.ex: She received her diploma last week.

diplomat.ex: A good diplomat should be very patient.

diplomatic.ex: We need to find a diplomatic way to say no.

direct.def: 直接的、坦率的、指示、導向、直接地
direct.ex: Could you direct me to the station?

direction.ex: Which direction are we heading in?

director.ex: He is the director of a large company.

dirt.ex: The car was covered in dirt.

dirty.ex: Don't touch me with your dirty hands.

disable.ex: The accident disabled him for life.

disadvantage.ex: One disadvantage of the plan is its high cost.

disagreement.ex: There was a sharp disagreement between the two officials.

disappear.ex: The sun disappeared behind the clouds.

disappoint.ex: I'm sorry to disappoint you, but I can't come.

disappointed.ex: She was disappointed with her exam results.

disappointment.ex: His failure was a great disappointment to his parents.

disapproval.ex: She showed her disapproval by shaking her head.

disapprove.ex: My parents disapprove of my boyfriend.

disaster.ex: The floods were a major disaster.

disc/disk.ex: Save the file onto a disk.

discard.def: 拋棄、丟棄、丟棄物、被拋棄者

discern.ex: It was difficult to discern any difference between the two copies.

discharge.def: 排放、解僱、履行、卸貨、排放面、放電
discharge.ex: The factory was fined for discharging chemicals into the river.

discipline.def: 紀律、訓練、學科、訓練、處罰

disconnect.ex: The phone was disconnected because the bill hadn't been paid.

discontinue.ex: Production of this model has been discontinued.

discount.def: 折扣、貼現、打折、低估、打折的
discount.ex: Students are entitled to a 10% discount.

discourage.ex: The bad weather discouraged us from going out.

discovery.def: 發現、發覺、被發現的事物
discovery.ex: The discovery of oil brought wealth to the region.

discuss.ex: We need to discuss the plan before we start.

discussion.ex: The matter is still under discussion.

disease.ex: He is suffering from a rare heart disease.

disguise.def: 偽裝、掩飾、假裝物、掩蔽、假裝、掩飾
disguise.ex: He disguised himself as a policeman.

disgust.def: 厭惡、反感、使厭惡、使反感
disgust.ex: The smell of the old food filled him with disgust.

dishonest.ex: It's dishonest to lie about your age.

dislike.def: 不喜歡、厭惡、不喜愛、反感

dismiss.col: dismiss a case, dismiss from work
dismiss.ex: She was dismissed from her job for being late.

disorder.def: 混亂、騷亂、不適、疾病、使混亂
disorder.ex: The room was in a state of complete disorder.

display.def: 顯示、陳列、展示、螢幕、表現、誇示
display.ex: The new products are on display in the window.

disposal.ex: The safe disposal of nuclear waste is a major problem.

dispose.ex: Please dispose of your trash in the bins provided.

dispute.ex: The two countries are in a bitter dispute over the border.

distance.ex: What's the distance between the two cities?

distant.ex: In the distant future, people might live on Mars.

distinct.ex: There's a distinct possibility that it will rain.

distinguish.ex: It's difficult to distinguish between the two colors.

distribute.ex: The food was distributed to the poor.

distribution.ex: The distribution of wealth is unequal.

district.def: 地區、區域、行政區、把...分區
district.ex: He lives in the business district of the city.

disturb.ex: Do not disturb me when I'm working.

ditch.def: 溝渠、壕溝、在...開溝、拋棄、墜機
ditch.ex: The car went into a ditch.

dive.def: 跳水、潛水、俯衝、跳水、潛水、低級酒吧
dive.ex: He likes to dive into the swimming pool.

divide.def: 分開、劃分、除以、分歧、分水嶺
divide.ex: The cake was divided into eight pieces.

divine.def: 神聖的、非凡的、牧師、占卜、預測

division.def: 分開、分配、部門、除法、分歧
division.ex: The company has four main divisions.

divorce.def: 離婚、脫離、與...離婚、使脫離、離婚的
divorce.ex: They decided to get a divorce.

dizzy.def: 頭暈的、眼花繚亂的、使頭暈
dizzy.ex: The smell of the paint made me feel dizzy.

do.def: 做、幹、進行、足夠、合適、聚會
do.col: do homework, do business, do one's best

dock.def: 碼頭、船塢、被告席、靠碼頭、扣（工資）
dock.ex: The ship is in the dock.

doctor/dr..def: 醫生、博士、授與博士學位、篡改
doctor/dr..col: go to the doctor, medical doctor
doctor/dr..ex: She is a doctor at the local hospital.

document.def: 文件、文獻、紀錄片、記錄、證實

documentary.ex: I watched a documentary about lions last night.

dog.col: pet dog, dog tired, hot dog
dog.ex: He is taking the dog for a walk.

doll.ex: She used to play with dolls.

domestic.def: 家庭的、國內的、馴養的、僕人
domestic.col: domestic market, domestic flight, domestic violence

dominant.def: 佔優勢的、支配的、顯性的
dominant.ex: English is the dominant language in international business.

dominate.def: 支配、控制、在...中佔首要地位、俯瞰
dominate.ex: The tall building dominates the city skyline.

donkey.ex: The donkey was carrying a heavy load.

dormitory/dorm.ex: I live in a university dormitory.

dosage.ex: The doctor will decide the dosage.

dose.ex: Take one dose of this medicine every four hours.

dot.def: 點、小點、小圓點、加點於、散佈、打點
dot.ex: He arrived at 10 o'clock on the dot.

double.def: 兩倍的、雙重的、兩倍、使加倍、加倍地、雙人房間
double.col: double room, double check, double standard

doubt.def: 懷疑、不確定、懷疑、不相信
doubt.col: no doubt, in doubt, without doubt
doubt.ex: There is no doubt that he's telling the truth.

doubtful.ex: I'm doubtful whether he can finish the task.

doughnut/donut.ex: I had a coffee and a doughnut for breakfast.

down.def: 向下、在下面、落下的、向下地、沿著...向下、羽毛、軟毛、擊倒、吞下
down.ex: She sat down on the chair.

downstairs.def: 在樓下、向樓下、樓下的、樓下

downward(s).ex: The path led downward to the valley.

dozen.col: a dozen eggs, by the dozen
dozen.ex: I'd like a dozen red roses, please.

draft.def: 草稿、草案、徵兵、通風、起草、徵兵、草稿的
draft.ex: This is just a rough draft of the report.

drag.def: 拖、拉、緩慢移動、阻力、令人厭煩的人事物
drag.ex: He dragged the heavy suitcase across the floor.

dragon.col: dragon boat, year of the dragon

drain.def: 排水、耗盡、排水管、消耗、排水

drama.ex: She is studying drama at college.

dramatic.ex: The results of the election were dramatic.

drawer.ex: The keys are in the desk drawer.

drawing.ex: That's a beautiful drawing of a cat.

dread.ex: I dread having to tells her the news.

dreadful.ex: We had some dreadful weather last week.

dream.col: sweet dreams, bad dream, follow your dream
dream.ex: What was your dream last night?

dress.def: 連衣裙、服裝、穿衣、裝飾、穿著打扮的
dress.col: get dressed, evening dress, dress up
dress.ex: She was wearing a beautiful red dress.

dresser.ex: I put my socks in the top drawer of the dresser.

dressing.ex: I like French dressing on my salad.

drift.def: 漂流、趨勢、大意、漂流、堆積
drift.ex: The boat drifted slowly out to sea.

drill.ex: He used a drill to make a hole in the wall.

drink.ex: What would you like to drink?

drip.ex: Water was dripping from the ceiling.

drive.def: 駕駛、驅動、推動、駕駛路程、幹勁
drive.ex: He is learning to drive a car.

driver.ex: The driver of the bus was very kind.

driveway.ex: He parked his car in the driveway.

drop.col: drop out, eye drops, rainfall drop
drop.ex: Don't drop that glass; it will break.

drought.ex: The crops died during the long drought.

drown.ex: He fell into the river and drowned.

drowsy.ex: The medicine made her feel drowsy.

drug.ex: He is on some new drugs for his heart condition.

drugstore.ex: I need to buy some toothpaste at the drugstore.

drum.def: 鼓、圓桶狀物、敲鼓、連續擊打
drum.ex: He is learning to play the drums.

drummer.ex: He is a famous rock drummer.

drunk.def: 喝醉的、醉漢、喝（過往分詞）
drunk.ex: He was too drunk to drive.

dry.def: 乾的、乾燥的、乾旱的、弄乾、變乾
dry.col: dry cleaning, dry ice, keep dry
dry.ex: The weather has been very dry lately.

dryer.ex: I put my wet clothes in the dryer.

duck.ex: We saw some ducks on the pond.

due.def: 應付的、到期的、由於、應得物
due.col: due to, in due course, with all due respect

dull.def: 乏味的、遲鈍的、暗淡的、使遲鈍、變遲鈍

dumb.ex: He was struck dumb with amazement.

dump.def: 丟棄、傾銷、垃圾場、丟棄、傾印
dump.ex: They dumped their old furniture in the street.

duration.ex: The course has a duration of three years.

dust.def: 灰塵、塵土、撒粉、除塵、變成灰塵
dust.ex: The furniture was covered in dust.
